name: Chocolate Chunk Butter Pecan Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter and brown sugar. Beat until well mixed.
4. Add egg yolk and vanilla extract; beat until combined.
5. Gradually add flour and salt, stirring until the mixture is smooth.
6. Press the dough evenly into the prepared baking pan.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly golden brown on top.
8. Remove from oven and immediately sprinkle chocolate chunks over the crust.
9. Allow to stand at room temperature for about 5 minutes, then spread the chocolate chunks evenly.
10. Sprinkle pecans over the chocolate.
11. Let cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
12. Cut into approximately 36 bars.
